instruction: Extract CRM fields and draft a compliant follow-up from this inbound real estate lead.
input_summary: Inbound buyer lead with location, budget, and showing intent after redaction.
input_redacted: [REDACTED LEAD] Buyer asks about a downtown condo, has preapproval, wants weekend showings, and asks for next steps.
output_summary: Created CRM-ready lead fields, missing-info questions, and a safe follow-up draft.
output_approved: {"crm_fields":{"intent":"buy","property_type":"condo","timeline":"near_term","financing":"preapproved"},"missing_questions":["preferred neighborhoods","showing availability","must-have features"],"follow_up":"Thanks for reaching out. I can help you compare available downtown condos and coordinate showings this weekend. What neighborhoods and times work best for you?"}

human_review.review_notes: Approved after removing an unsupported timeline assumption.

stable_rules: Ask for missing budget, timing, location, financing, and showing availability.

instruction: Classify the issue, extract repro steps, and draft a concise engineering handoff.
input_summary: Redacted support ticket describing a failed import job.
input_redacted: [REDACTED TICKET] CSV import fails with a validation error after adding a custom field. User says it worked last week.
output_summary: Classified likely regression, extracted repro steps, and requested schema/version details.
output_approved: Issue type: likely regression. Repro: create a custom field, upload a CSV including that field, start import, observe validation error. Missing data: account plan, field type, CSV header sample, import job ID, exact error text. Handoff: investigate import validator changes around custom-field mapping.

human_review.review_notes: Human removed a claim about a specific commit because it was not verified.

stable_rules: Do not cite files, commits, or root causes unless verified.
